preventionStrategies.name: Mode-Aware Save Logic
preventionStrategies.description: Implement conditional save logic that uses updateDraft when editing existing drafts

implementation.pattern: if (editDraft?.id && mode === 'edit') { await updateDraft(editDraft.id, changes) } else { await createDraft(data) }

preventionStrategies.name: Draft ID State Tracking
preventionStrategies.description: Maintain current draft ID in component state for proper update operations

preventionStrategies.name: Explicit Mode Prop Consumption
preventionStrategies.description: Ensure mode prop is actually used in component logic, not just passed

implementation.pattern: Use mode prop in save handlers, form validation, and UI rendering
implementation.location: All form components with create/edit modes

preventionStrategies.name: TDD Edit Flow Validation
preventionStrategies.description: Write tests that verify edit operations update existing records instead of creating new ones

implementation.pattern: Test that editDraft.id remains same after save operation

preventionStrategies.name: Modal State Isolation
preventionStrategies.description: Prevent modal re-initialization from breaking edit context

implementation.pattern: Use stable keys and prevent unnecessary re-renders during edit mode

debuggingApproaches.name: Edit Mode Verification
debuggingApproaches.description: Add console logs to verify mode and draft ID throughout save flow

debuggingApproaches.name: State Transition Tracking
debuggingApproaches.description: Monitor component state changes during edit initialization

debuggingApproaches.name: Network Request Monitoring
debuggingApproaches.description: Verify correct API endpoints are called (POST for create, PUT/PATCH for update)
debugCommands: Monitor network tab for POST /drafts vs PUT /drafts/:id
Add interceptors to log draft service method calls

testingPatterns.name: Edit Flow Integration Test
testingPatterns.description: End-to-end test that verifies edit operations don't create duplicates
testingPatterns.testCase: Load draft → Edit content → Save → Verify same ID and no duplicates

testingPatterns.name: Mode Prop Validation Test
testingPatterns.description: Unit test that verifies mode prop affects save behavior
testingPatterns.testCase: Component with mode='edit' → Save → Should call updateDraft, not createDraft

testingPatterns.name: State Persistence Test
testingPatterns.description: Test that edit context survives modal re-renders and state changes
testingPatterns.testCase: Open edit modal → Trigger re-render → Verify draft ID maintained

regressionPrevention.check: Draft count remains same after edit operations
EditDraft ID matches returned draft ID after save
Mode prop is consumed in component logic
